page: Amazon Web Services g7e.12xlarge is a graphics-intensive server instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores utilizing the x86_64 architecture with Intel Xeon 8559C processors running at 2.4 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz, providing 10.67 GB of RAM per core. For accelerated workloads, the instance includes two NVIDIA Blackwell RTX Pro 6000 GPUs, delivering a combined 192 GB of VRAM. Storage is provided via a 3800 GB local NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a 400 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier performance in several key areas. The instance achieves top-tier results in Geekbench single-core performance, image processing, static web serving throughput, and LLM inference speeds across small, medium, and large models for both prompt processing and text generation. It demonstrates strong performance in memory bandwidth, multi-threaded decompression, software compilation, ray tracing, and Passmark CPU and database operations. CPU performance under stress-ng tests falls in the average range.

Given its high-density hardware profile, which bundles dual Blackwell GPUs, a substantial 512 GB DDR5 memory array, and fast local NVMe storage, the g7e.12xlarge offers a resource-dense configuration for demanding workloads. The integration of advanced instruction sets, such as Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions and Advanced Vector Extensions, enhances its efficiency for specialized mathematical computations. This server is optimized for graphics-intensive applications, large language model inference, real-time ray tracing, image processing, and high-throughput database operations.
description: Amazon Web Services g7e.12xlarge is a graphics-intensive, high-memory server instance designed for demanding computational and visual workloads. Powered by the Nitro hypervisor, it features 48 vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8559C processor, 512.0 GB of 6 GHz DDR5 memory, and 3800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The instance is equipped with two NVIDIA Blackwell RTX Pro 6000 GPUs providing 192 GB of total VRAM, alongside a 400 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmarks show top-tier performance in LLM inference, image processing, and static web serving, with strong results in memory bandwidth and database operations. This hardware profile makes the g7e.12xlarge highly suitable for large-scale AI inference, graphics rendering, ray tracing, and memory-intensive database applications.
og_description: Amazon Web Services g7e.12xlarge is a graphics-intensive server featuring 48 vCPUs, 512 GB DDR5 RAM, 3800 GB NVMe SSD, and two NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs with 192 GB VRAM for high-performance workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services g7e.12xlarge features 48 vCPUs, 512 GB DDR5 RAM, two NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, and 3800 GB NVMe SSD for intensive graphics and AI.
tagline: A high-density accelerator instance combining dual Blackwell GPUs, 512 GB DDR5 memory, and fast local NVMe storage for demanding AI workloads.
bullet_points: Dual NVIDIA Blackwell RTX Pro 6000 GPUs with 192 GB total VRAM
48 vCPUs via Intel Xeon 8559C processor with AMX and AVX-512 support
512 GB of high-speed 6 GHz DDR5 memory
3800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and 400 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier benchmark performance in LLM inference and image processing
